reviews.comment:
Hermoso el lugar..la entrada muy bonita . prólija y limpia..en la estacion de servicio la chica del kiosco muy amable

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place...the entrance is very nice, neat and clean...the girl at the kiosk at the gas station was very friendly

reviews.comment:
Suele llenarse bastante en temporada y cuando hemos pasado sólo hay uno o dos playeros. Por esta razón la última vez demoramos como 20 o 30 minutos

(Translated by Google)
It tends to get quite crowded during the season, and when we've been there, there's only one or two sandpipers. That's why it took us about 20 or 30 minutes last time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMnJMWU93EAE

Excellent!!! There was no gas in Jacobacci or Valcheta, but I found some there without any problems.

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza había para almorzar solo sanwich de jamón crudo y queso y salame horribles y encima carísimos no puede ser que sea lo único que tengan para comer

(Translated by Google)
It was a disgrace; for lunch there were only ham and cheese sandwiches and horrible salami, and on top of that, they were incredibly expensive. It can't be that this is all they have to eat.
